name: 秘密懸念鉤子
description: 女主隱藏聽障身份，用頭髮遮住助聽器，這個秘密貫穿前半段劇情，觀眾一直期待秘密被揭露的高潮時刻。同時Ryan發現助聽器卻不嘲笑她，形成與其他人的鮮明對比，強化男主的獨特魅力。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: You're wearing a hearing aid. / Little deffy. She's a deafy. / He didn't mock me for wearing that. / Girls shouldn't smoke. After all, it makes your breath smell and your teeth yellow.
